slides.headline: Your busiest competitor isn't better than you.
slides.body: He's just awake when his phone rings. Swipe.

slides.headline: Same skills. Same prices. Same area.
slides.body: So why's his diary full and yours patchy? It's not the work. It's the phone.

slides.headline: He answers. Or something answers for him.
slides.body: Every call picked up in 2 rings. Every quote chased. Every emergency caught at 9pm.

slides.label: of customers book the first trade who actually answers

slides.headline: First to answer wins the job. Always has.
You don't need to outwork him.
slides.body: You need to stop letting calls ring out while you're on the tools.

slides.headline: How many did you miss this week?
slides.save: Save this — it's the cheapest fix in your business
